## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî new feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî bug fix
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî code restructuring, no behavior change
- [ ] `test` ‚Äî adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî build, tooling, deps

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch targets `develop` (or `master` for hotfixes)
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits format
- [ ] `pnpm run test` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] New behavior has test coverage
- [ ] If adding a distiller: evidence backlinks are included in all `DistillResult` entries
